title: Mecca Brands NZ Pty Ltd — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: Named in ASIC media release 26-057MR as one of three Mecca-group entities paying an infringement notice for allegedly failing to lodge an audited financial report by the statutory deadline.
scope: Received an ASIC infringement notice ($198,000) for alleged late lodgement of an audited financial report for FY ended 28 December 2024, per 26-057MR
